description_long: This is a young adult female dressed in a cheerleader-inspired outfit, featuring a cropped top with crisscross straps at the back and a pleated mini skirt. She wears thigh-high stockings with visible text, leg warmers, and athletic shoes, giving her a sporty and energetic appearance. Her arms are extended horizontally, and she has a fit, athletic build. Accessories include wristbands and a scrunchie, and her hair is styled in high pigtails. The outfit is detailed with layered textures and visible seams, and the figure's facial features and body proportions are realistic. The overall look is vibrant and dynamic, suitable for urban or recreational environments.
description: Athletic young woman in a cheerleader-style outfit with pigtails, thigh-high stockings, and sporty accessories. She stands with arms outstretched, exuding energy and realism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the face, the layered skirt, and the text on the thigh-high stocking.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the crisscross straps of the top, the back of the skirt, and both pigtails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the other profile, arm, and leg details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the facial features, cropped top, pleated skirt, and both arms extended.
attribute_clothing_type: cheerleader-style cropped top and pleated mini skirt with thigh-high stockings, leg warmers, and wristbands
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in high pigtails
